falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous peak of bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above the prior pattern's resistance level would invalidate the 'bottom' hypothesis, suggesting a continuation of the uptrend rather than a reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NYSE exceeds 200% of the 20-day average for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top scenario, contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and proving the HOLD signal incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major policy shift injecting liquidity would directly counteract the conditions expected in the bottom_2024_aug pattern, falsifying the current UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
